# Automations Catalog

All schedules and sensors across every Dagster code location. All times use the
`America/New_York` timezone.

<!-- Generated by scripts/gen-automations-doc.py — do not edit manually -->

## kipptaf

Network-wide code location covering CMO-level integrations.
